title: DC vs. Engage Arms et al

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: DC vs. Engage Arms et al
Welcome to My FOIA DC!
communications.communication:
Dear James  Manning, 
 
Thank you for registering with My FOIA DC.  If you did not submit your request through the public portal but are receiving this e-mail, an account has been created for you. 
 
Once your email address has been verified, you can log into the Records Center to update any contact or password information.  You will so be able to monitor and track the progress of your FOIA request. 
 Your Login ID is:  210433-47061910@requests.muckrock.com 
 
If you did not submit your request through the public portal but are receiving this e-mail, an account has been created for you where you can track and monitor the status of your request and receive any documents in response to your request. 
 
 
If you cannot remember your password you may request a temporary password here: Request Temporary Password (https://u8387778.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.VEsWrlMiJDg0mXafq1mEXcOhwwBPGHifqhO6OQOqgdyGyWCLze8ntZWjVUd5lac7M3Vr6kaFueddczT-2BZfbGsxnQ-2F3yhicsXUgQUCzpDDAg-3Da8q__1YCSU3LQChG2HoNLFY5cn580-2FwRaOOhzJiAk5tM8QRMqdIAHLST17SGLBL-2BNwuoUlSS2dQ2HKpiBa2EUBrWtTfBNvkTZuPlVMzhiZ0ZbjJ46-2FPzAqpjgZcZOVQQo-2FfABfJ-2Fjxxkxqdb1B8RWrVleeSHTknOhOdbxLewl8ImfWnO3FD7A4VlrTtZPNmKoSlujnRWLlNRzcm-2BDtQPt-2F79FbTqh99F5glHhrwgyBEyegkQ-3D) 
 
Please login to "My Records Center" to update your account information, track the status of your request and receive requested records when they become available. This is an auto-generated email and has originated from an unmonitored email account. Please DO NOT REPLY.

communications.subject: Public Records Request :: R008153-050526
communications.communication:
Dear James Manning: 
Thank you for your interest in public records of District of Columbia. Your request has been received and is being processed. Your request was received in this office on 5/5/2026 and given the reference number R008153-050526 for tracking purposes. 
In all future correspondence regarding this request, please reference request number R008153-050526. You can monitor the progress of your request in the " My Records Center". (https://u8387778.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.VEsWrlMiJDg0mXafq1mEXcOhwwBPGHifqhO6OQOqgdwS-2FNpGxLbyeC-2FXmT4cIxy25Fo__1YCSU3LQChG2HoNLFY5cn580-2FwRaOOhzJiAk5tM8QRMqdIAHLST17SGLBL-2BNwuoUtv9cKaDe2YWrBtGgSE7WGjUFRi9DGyEen9L4OWEtQZ9u4NaFMRLLWJZBGGeRhpGDJX-2B18ZqrDbBU3ON9xzgh8kQyTp86RS7daanNmjGq0ZtQDZEMakCL5rp3tP82OVzzse3esAwTNesBlEJWCJy8FdQ-2FeYw-2BWAHZKDc066-2BF-2Fvi0-2FFZe2chPpbt5T0yXwii0bg18nILfA3T0xZAsZVCH-2FfTdOstmkFPnFhhh28EMu2xYitT-2BfH4SljTL8XHsZXVed-2FQS1iPVrh1y8VXBM9xD1FdmBcNgLkyHF8qEA79yhC3TtzMLZmz0n9P50tQkMvID) 
 
The District of Columbia is required to respond to your FOIA request within fifteen (15) business days of its receipt.  See D.C. Official Code § 2-532(c)(2011).  However, under certain circumstances, D.C. Official Code § 2-532(d)(2011) authorizes the District to extend, by ten (10) additional days, the deadline by which it must respond to a FOIA request.  One of the circumstances provided by that statute is a case in which the District needs additional time to search for, collect and examine voluminous amounts of records and/or consult with an additional D.C. agency. 
For any questions regarding your request, please contact the FOIA office directly. Find the list of agency Open Government and FOIA contact information by visiting FOIA Contact Information. For ease of reference, we ask that you have your FOIA Reference Number available when you contact the FOIA office. 
Regards, 
District of Columbia
